title: EnergyCommunity
description: An Energy Community entity representing a community-level organization for joint energy generation, sharing, and trading. Based on the Austrian EEG (Erneuerbare-Energie-Gemeinschaft) model.

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity in URN format (urn:ngsi-ld:EnergyCommunity:<instance-id>)

type.description: NGSI-LD entity type. Must be EnergyCommunity.

communityType.description: Type of energy community. EEG stands for Erneuerbare-Energie-Gemeinschaft (Renewable Energy Community).

totalMembers.description: Total number of members in the energy community.

totalCapacityKW.description: Total installed generation capacity of the community in kilowatts (kW).

address.description: The postal address of the energy community's registered office.

areaServed.description: The geographic area served by the energy community, represented as a GeoJSON geometry.

foundedDate.description: The date and time when the energy community was officially founded (ISO 8601 format).

hasMembers.description: Array of URN references to EnergyCommunityMember entities that belong to this community.
